news.title: NTPC chief cautions against dependence on single supplier for nuclear technology
news.description: India should prioritise control over technology and resources, even if domestic options are 5-10% costlier at the initial stage, to avoid supply chain vulnerabilities, says NTPC Chairman Gurdeep Singh

news.title: Panther Lake Powered Framework Laptop 13 Pro Sees Linux Microphone Fix
news.description: Ahead of the new Framework Laptop 13 Pro laptops beginning to ship in June, an audio microphone fix was merged this weekend to the mainline Linux kernel for these new Intel Panther Lake powered devices...

news.title: A 45,000-person labor strike at Samsung’s memory chip plants could throw a wrench into the AI boom
NVIDIA Stock Plunges 4.4% as AI Demand Fears Trigger Sharp Sell-Off in Tech Giant
news.description: NVIDIA shares fell over 4% amid concerns about AI spending slowdowns and high valuations, wiping out $250 billion in market value. Analysts see this as a market reassessment rather than a fundamental shift.

news.title: XFX Swift Radeon RX 9070 OC Dual fan 16GB $799 + Delivery @ Scorptec
news.description: Was looking around for a 9070 (non-xt) and thought this was a good deal. Also a gigabyte triple fan here for the same price: https://www.scorptec.com.au/product/graphics-cards/amd/11678…

news.title: Samsung, labour union to meet in a last-ditch attempt to avert strike and upheaval in semiconductor industry - CNBC TV18
news.description: Samsung Electronics and its main union start key talks to avert a strike, clashing over AI driven profit sharing, bonuses, and pay ahead of a May 21 walkout deadline

news.title: Playing Atari ST Music on the Amiga with Zero CPU
news.description: How to emulate an Atari YM2149 audio chip on Amiga at litteraly 0 CPU cost, by Arnaud Carré

news.title: Savvy tech buyers are getting this HP EliteBook for just $360 while they can
news.description:
Macworld







TL;DR: This Grade A+ refurb HP EliteBook 840 G8 gives you a business-class laptop with 16GB RAM, a 512GB SSD, Wi-Fi 6, and Windows 11 Pro for just $359.99 (reg. $899.98).

news.title: Tata Electronics and ASML partner on India's first semiconductor fab
Samsung and labor union resume negotiations to avert massive strike

A prolonged strike at Samsung could disrupt global semiconductor supply chains, impacting tech industries and escalating hardware costs.
The post Samsung and labor union resume negotiations to avert massive strike appeared first on Crypto Briefing.
